subcodes.first_line: This is a day in which the gates of heaven stand open and the showers of mercy descend at every moment, yet mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که ابواب آسمان مفتوحست و امطار رحمت در کل حین نازل ولکن خلق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
